positive: A whimsical, stylized golden retriever puppy silhouette playing in a field of glowing fireflies and oversized, stylized mushrooms. The scene should be rendered with high contrast, deep indigo and emerald tones, and backlit by a soft, magical glow. The composition must feature the puppy centrally, surrounded by clean, legible negative space on the edges. Intricate detail, woodcut print style, vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, suitable for apparel printing, cinematic lighting, clean outlines, highly stylized.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, ugly, low detail, jpeg artifacts, messy
